subject: Vraxen accusation
fact: Vraxen accused Veperyd of skimming from the betting pool.
source_quote: Vraxen accuses Veperyd of skimming from the betting pool

subject: Veperyd reaction
fact: Veperyd reacted violently by slamming the table and claiming the Abyss demands sacrifice.
source_quote: Veperyd reacts violently, slamming the table and claiming the Abyss demands sacrifice

subject: Veris interrogation attempt
fact: High Inquisitor Veris attempted to interrogate Felkur.
source_quote: High Inquisitor Veris attempts to interrogate Felkur

subject: Felkur
fact: High Inquisitor Veris identified Felkur as a master smith with ties to Mulmaster.
source_quote: identifying him as a master smith with ties to Mulmaster

subject: Paranoia redirection
fact: Daein and Bramgrim successfully redirected the conversation to fuel paranoia between Vraxen and Veperyd.
source_quote: Daein and Bramgrim successfully redirect the conversation to fuel the paranoia between Vraxen and Veperyd

subject: Owlbear distraction
fact: The party's Owlbear companion jumped onto the dining table, roaring and smashing objects.
source_quote: The party's Owlbear companion jumps onto the dining table, roaring and smashing objects

subject: Key theft
fact: Daein used telekinetic power to snatch the runic key from the table.
source_quote: Daein uses telekinetic power to snatch the runic key from the table

subject: Illusion of Veris
fact: An illusion was used to mimic High Inquisitor Veris conspiring with the General.
source_quote: An illusion is used to mimic High Inquisitor Veris, making it seem as though the mage is conspiring with the General

subject: Dinner battle start
fact: Vraxen ordered his guards to flay the giant.
source_quote: Vraxen orders his guards to flay the giant

subject: Veperyd retaliation
fact: Veperyd retaliated with abyssal fire.
source_quote: Veperyd retaliates with abyssal fire

subject: Party escape
fact: The party used the chaos to slip away and begin their ascent toward the upper vaults of the spire.
source_quote: The party uses the chaos to slip away and begin their ascent toward the upper vaults of the spire

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap was noticed to be missing as the party made their escape.
source_quote: Pipyap is noticed to be missing as the party makes their escape

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The Six-Fingered Courtyard is a ritual area on a plateau in Maerimydra featuring a polished obsidian floor surrounded by ebony pillars.
source_quote: A ritual area on a plateau in Maerimydra featuring a polished obsidian floor surrounded by ebony pillars

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The Six-Fingered Courtyard is where the party ambushed and kidnapped the fire giant Brandyr.
source_quote: This is where the party ambushed and kidnapped the fire giant Brandyr

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is a city in the Underdark currently occupied by fire giants who have made a pact with the demon lord Graz'zt.
source_quote: A city in the Underdark currently occupied by fire giants who have made a pact with the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a formidable tower in Maerimydra overseen by the Arcanaloth Vraxen.
source_quote: A formidable tower in Maerimydra overseen by the Arcanaloth Vraxen

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning features a dining hall with a magically distorted table.
source_quote: It features a dining hall with a magically distorted table

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning are accessible only by a runic key.
source_quote: upper vaults accessible only by a runic key

subject: Mulmaster
fact: Mulmaster is a surface city known for its powerful wizards.
source_quote: A surface city known for its powerful wizards

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr is a fire giant who was the target of the party's kidnapping plot.
source_quote: A fire giant who was the target of the party's kidnapping plot

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr was magically put to sleep, shrunk, and stuffed into a portable hole during the ambush.
source_quote: She was magically put to sleep, shrunk, and stuffed into a portable hole during the ambush

subject: Cambions
fact: Cambions are half-demon, half-human guards stationed at the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: Half-demon, half-human guards stationed at the Six-Fingered Courtyard

subject: Cambion manipulation
fact: Cambions were tricked into believing Graz'zt had personally smited Brandyr.
source_quote: tricked into believing Graz'zt had personally smited Brandyr

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap is an imp who serves as a guide and informant for the party.
source_quote: An imp who serves as a guide and informant for the party

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap revealed the layout of the Spire and the existence of Vraxen's runic key.
source_quote: He revealed the layout of the Spire and the existence of Vraxen's runic key

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is an Arcanaloth with a fox-like face who serves as the enforcer of Graz'zt's contracts in Maerimydra.
source_quote: An Arcanaloth with a fox-like face who serves as the enforcer of Graz'zt's contracts in Maerimydra

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen carries a runic key that grants access to the spire's upper vaults.
source_quote: He carries a runic key that grants access to the spire's upper vaults

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a mutated fire giant whose skin weeps oily black smoke.
source_quote: A mutated fire giant whose skin weeps oily black smoke

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd runs the Colosseum, the duels, and the betting pool in Maerimydra.
source_quote: He runs the Colosseum, the duels, and the betting pool in Maerimydra

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris is a cold and calculating mage from Mulmaster who is hunting for the 'Phantom Ghost' thief.
source_quote: A cold and calculating mage from Mulmaster who is hunting for the 'Phantom Ghost' thief

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris attended the dinner at the Spire.
source_quote: He attended the dinner at the Spire

subject: Magical Token
fact: Felkur used a specialized item called a Magical Token to cast a high-potency sleep spell.
source_quote: A specialized item used by Felkur to cast a high-potency sleep spell

subject: Magical Token
fact: Using the Magical Token left Felkur with four tokens remaining.
source_quote: Using it left Felkur with four tokens remaining

subject: Portable Hole
fact: A Portable Hole is a magical extra-dimensional storage space equipped with a custom-built breathing apparatus.
source_quote: A magical extra-dimensional storage space equipped with a custom-built breathing apparatus

subject: Portable Hole
fact: The party used the Portable Hole to hide the unconscious and shrunken fire giant Brandyr.
source_quote: used by the party to hide the unconscious and shrunken fire giant Brandyr

subject: Reduction Scroll
fact: Reduction Scrolls are magical scrolls used by the party to shrink the fire giant Brandyr's massive frame.
source_quote: Magical scrolls used by the party to shrink the fire giant Brandyr's massive frame

subject: Reduction Scroll
fact: Two Reduction Scrolls were used to reduce Brandyr by two size categories.
source_quote: Two scrolls were used to reduce her by two size categories

subject: Runic Key
fact: The Runic Key is carried by Vraxen and grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A key carried by Vraxen that grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Runic Key
fact: The Runic Key was dangling loose on the obsidian dining table during the chaos of the dinner.
source_quote: It was dangling loose on the obsidian dining table during the chaos of the dinner

subject: Runic Key
fact: The Runic Key was snatched by the party using telekinesis.
source_quote: and was snatched by the party using telekinesis

subject: Seeming Scroll
fact: The Seeming Scroll is a magical scroll held by the party as a backup plan to disguise themselves as servants.
source_quote: A magical scroll held by the party as a backup plan to disguise themselves as servants

subject: The Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a powerful book located within the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A powerful book located within the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: The Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is desired by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: It is desired by Maram il Vass

subject: Divination Artifact
fact: The Divination Artifact is a powerful item originally stolen from Mulmaster by Felkur.
source_quote: A powerful item originally stolen from Mulmaster by Felkur

subject: Divination Artifact
fact: The Divination Artifact grants perfect divination and protection from scrying.
source_quote: It grants perfect divination and protection from scrying

subject: Divination Artifact
fact: Felkur accidentally activated the Divination Artifact and then sold it for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: Felkur accidentally activated it and then sold it for 45 gold pieces

subject: Sleep spell cast
fact: Felkur cast a powerful enchantment spell called Sleep using a magical token.
source_quote: A powerful enchantment cast by Felkur using a magical token

subject: Brandyr incapacitated
fact: The Sleep spell successfully incapacitated the fire giant Brandyr.
source_quote: that successfully incapacitated the fire giant Brandyr

subject: Reduce spell cast
fact: The Reduce transmutation spell was cast twice by Bramgrim and Daein.
source_quote: A transmutation spell cast twice — by Bramgrim and Daein

subject: Brandyr size reduction
fact: The Reduce spell shrank the fire giant Brandyr's size by two categories.
source_quote: to shrink the fire giant Brandyr's size by two categories

subject: Nature's Veil used
fact: Akritas used the ranger ability Nature's Veil to become invisible as a bonus action.
source_quote: A ranger ability used by Akritas to become invisible as a bonus action

subject: Akritas approach
fact: Nature's Veil allowed Akritas to approach the incapacitated giant and the cambion guards undetected.
source_quote: allowing her to approach the incapacitated giant and the cambion guards undetected
